qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:He said, "I am reading a book."
o: He said that he was reading a book.
He said that I was reading a book.
He said that he is reading a book.
He said that he had been reading a book.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:She said to me, "Where do you live?"
o: She asked me where I lived.
She asked me where did I live.
She asked me where you lived.
She asked me where I live.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:The teacher said, "You must obey your elders."
o: The teacher said that we must obey our elders.
The teacher said that we had to obey our elders.
The teacher said that we should obey our elders.
The teacher said that we might obey our elders.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:The captain said to his soldiers, "March forward!"
o: The captain ordered his soldiers to march forward.
The captain told his soldiers that they should march forward.
The captain requested his soldiers to march forward.
The captain asked his soldiers if they would march forward.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:He exclaimed, "Alas! I am undone."
o: He exclaimed with sorrow that he was undone.
He exclaimed with joy that he was undone.
He exclaimed that he was undone.
He exclaimed sorrowfully that I was undone.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:My friend said to me, "Are you coming to the party tonight?"
o: My friend asked me if I was coming to the party that night.
My friend asked me if I am coming to the party tonight.
My friend asked me whether I was coming to the party tonight.
My friend asked me if I had been coming to the party that night.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:Rahul said, "I have finished my homework."
o: Rahul said that he had finished his homework.
Rahul said that I had finished my homework.
Rahul said that he has finished his homework.
Rahul said that he finished his homework.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:The old man said, "May God bless you!"
o: The old man prayed that God might bless me.
The old man wished that God might bless you.
The old man said that God might bless me.
The old man prayed that God bless me.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:The teacher said, "The sun rises in the east."
o: The teacher said that the sun rises in the east.
The teacher said that the sun rose in the east.
The teacher said that the sun had risen in the east.
The teacher said that the sun would rise in the east.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির Indirect Speech রূপান্তর করুন:He said, "I went to Kolkata yesterday."
o: He said that he had gone to Kolkata the previous day.
He said that he went to Kolkata the day before.
He said that he had gone to Kolkata yesterday.
He said that he has gone to Kolkata the previous day.
